titleStmt.title: SII 19.113: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 113. (A.R. No. 123 of 1929.) ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of two plots of land measuring 4 mā and 3 kāṇi respectively, by Kumārandai Kāri Ādittaṉ of Parāntakapuram in Iḍaiyāṟṟu-nāḍu for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple of Īśvara-Bhaṭṭāraka at Tiruttavattuṟai in the same nāḍu. The former situated in Teṅgaṅkuḍi a brahmadēya in Brahmapurinallūr in Maḻa-nāḍu, is said to have been originally purchased from the sabhā of that village by one Kaṇḍaṉ Tiruvaruḷi of Pāaiyūr a merchant of Irāyaripuram, and then to have passed on from his sons as strīdhanam to Kumārandai Kāri Maḻapāḍi who in turn sold it to the donor. The other land was also purchased by the donor (evidently from the assembly), the price paid being 20 kaḻañju for both. An equal amount made up of 13 kaḻañju received from the donor and 7 from the temple funds, was paid to the assembly, towards the exemption of the taxes iṟai, echchōṟu, veṭṭi, vēdinai, śennīr-veṭṭi etc.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesariparmmaṟku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu Iṭaiyāṟṟunāṭṭut tiruttavat tuṟai Īśvarabhaṭṭārakaṟku
Innāṭṭu parāntakapurattu kumārantai kāri Ātittaneṉ candrādityavaṟ Iravum pakalum moru nontāviḷakke
rivataṟku vaitta nilamāvatu maḻanāṭṭu piramapuri nallūrk kaṇṭattu brahmateyaṅ teṅkaṅ kuṭi sabhaiyā
riṭai Irāyaripurattu vyāpāri pālaiyūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭan tiruvaruḷi vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyaṉā yi
van makkaḷpakkal kumārantai kāri maḻapāṭi stridhana
m peṟṟuṭaiyaṉāy Ivaṉpakkal kumārantai kāri
Ātittaneṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya teṅkaṅkuṭi
nāṉmāvinukku kiḻpāṟkellai mokiliya
ṉ ceṭṭi nārāyaṇaṉ nilattukkum rāyidharan kṛ
ṣṇa ṉūraṉāḷkiṉṟa nilattukku meṟkkun ten
pāṟkellai vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai
Ūrellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kālāpan tattanā
rāyaṇaṉ nilattukkum kṛṣṇan tāyaṉ nilattukkut teṟkuṅ kiḻak
kum teṅkaṅkuṭit tevar nilattukkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiyu ḷakappaṭṭa nilam nāṉmāvum mukkāṇikku ki
ḻpāṟkellai pilāṟṟukku meṟkkun tenpāṟkellai kṛṣṇan centa
nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kāccuva nārāyaṇan kecuvaṉum moki
liyaṉ nārāyaṇan māṟaṉum nārāyaṇan mātevaṉum nilattukku kiḻakkum va
ṭapāṟkellai kāccuvaṉ cerumaṉ pāṇṭa nilattukkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiyu ḷakappaṭṭa nilam mukkāṇiyumākat taṭi Iraṇṭāy nāṉkumā muk
kāṇikkum vilaiyāka kāri Ātittan kuṭutta poṉ 2 10� Ivaṉe yiṟaikāvalākak kuṭutta
poṉ 10 3� Ittevar kuṭutta poṉ 7� Ākap poṉ nāṟpatiṉkaḻañcuṅ koṇ ṭinnila
m Iṟaiyu meccoṟum veṭṭiyum vetiṉaiyuñ cennirveṭṭiyuṭpaṭa maṟṟeppeṟap paṭṭatuṅ kāṭ
ṭātomāy Innilam Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom teṅkaṅkuṭi sabhaiyom Itaṟ ṟiṟampil mu
ṟpaṭṭa panmāheśvarare dhanmādhaṉattu sabhaiyākavum taṉittākavum muṉpu niṟkilum nil
lāviṭilum taṇṭamiṭ ṭiṟuppittum piṉṉaiyum Innilattu bhokame koṇṭu viḷak kerippa
tāka Oṭṭik kuṭutton teṅkaṅkuṭi sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvararirakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 19.113 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
